headline: AT&T Shares Rise 6.9% in Six Months: How to Play the Stock?
summary: T outpaces sector and S&P on subscriber gains, FirstNet deal and AI-ready network push. But heavy capex and fierce competition weigh on the outlook.

headline: Can AT&T's OneConnect Unlimited Connectivity Solution Stoke Growth?
summary: T unveils OneConnect, merging wireless and home Internet into a simple subscription, aiming to streamline connectivity and billing for modern device-heavy households.

headline: Uniti (UNIT) Soars 15.8%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Uniti (UNIT) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From T-Mobile's Report
summary: T-Mobile is expected to unveil its first-quarter results later this month, and analysts are projecting a double-digit decline in profit.

headline: Uniti Group (UNIT) Climbs 15.8% as 2 Firms Eye Business Assets
summary: Uniti Group Inc. (NASDAQ:UNIT) is one of the 10 Stocks Dominating Today’s Market Surge. Uniti extended its rally for a third straight day on Tuesday, jumping 15.80 percent to finish at $9.38 apiece, as investor sentiment was bolstered by reports that two technology giants are setting their sights on buying its assets.
